chunks.title: Rehoboam at Shechem and the Request
chunks.reason: Narrative introduction of Rehoboam's coronation attempt and Jeroboam's return.

chunks.title: Counsel of Elders and Young Men
chunks.reason: Complete exchange between the king and his advisors followed by the king's harsh response.

chunks.title: The Division of the Kingdom
chunks.reason: Israel's rejection of Rehoboam and Jeroboam's coronation.

chunks.title: God Stops the War
chunks.reason: Divine instruction to Rehoboam via Shemaiah to halt the military campaign.

chunks.title: Jeroboam's Religious Reforms
chunks.reason: Narrative of Jeroboam establishing alternative worship centers and priesthood.
